steps.title: Match the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is ayllus, a plural noun referring to multiple family clans. The sentence is also about the Inca Empire in the past, so the verb must be plural and past tense.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: A, B, and C are singular forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject. The needed verb form is both plural and appropriate for the past-time context. The answer is D.
